text.title: AWS Well-Architected Framework Checklists (2025-2026) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this a pre-launch review (workload not yet in prod) OR a quarterly audit (already live)?

conclusion.verdict: Run full checklist; 0 HIGH gating launch

branch.question: Compliance audit pending in next 90 days?

conclusion.verdict: Run full checklist; prioritise HIGH + compliance-mapped items
Quarterly run; focus on drift since last review

text.example: pre_launch=true → Run full checklist; 0 HIGH gates launch. References rule review-cadence.
